content.en:
This master and the ten cosmic gods were the guards assigned to Ye Tian by the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

"Meet His Highness Wanfa!"

This master and the ten cosmic gods saw Ye Tian come out, and they all paid homage to the Dao.

Ye Tian had a brief exchange with this master and the ten cosmic gods, and knew their origins.

This master is called the Dark Master, one of the high-ranking human beings, but the status of this Dark Lord is definitely not as good as the Xuanyuan Master, it should be the kind of Lord with more ordinary strength, otherwise he would not be sent to Ye Tian as a guard.

And those ten cosmic gods are one of the members of the Terran Supreme Hall Guard, responsible for guarding the order of the Terran Supreme Palace, and their status is second only to the town hall envoys of the yellow-level region.

Due to the change of a group of guards, the original group of guards was not withdrawn, Ye Tian ordered them to guard the galaxy earth, so as not to have problems on the earth.

Although the Dark Lord and these ten cosmic gods have become Ye Tian's guards, their usual cultivation is still free. But only when Ye Tian came out of the supreme hall of the human race, they would follow Ye Tian.

During this period of time, Ye Tian's usual cultivation was in that mysterious black lotus, and he also gave this black lotus a name - Chaos Black Lotus.

Cultivating in the Chaos Black Lotus, its effect was very good, it helped Ye Tian to cultivate the Chaos Refining Body Technique, especially after he became an immortal, coupled with the supreme cultivation talent, his cultivation speed increased many times.

According to Ye Tian's calculations, with the help of 100 times the time acceleration, he was expected to cultivate the Chaos Refining Body Technique to the sixth layer of the Perfection Realm within a hundred years.

At that time, he was expected to hit the seventh and highest layer of the Chaos Refining Technique.

A few more days passed.

The Lord of Darkness informed Ye Tian that the Kunwu Supreme was looking for him.

"Lord of Darkness, take me to the Kunwu Supreme!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The Dark Lord nodded and led Ye Tian to the Kunwu Palace.

The Kunwu Supreme saw Ye Tian and immediately let the Dark Lord leave.

in the main hall.

This time, there was only one Kungo Supreme.

"Ye Tian, I came to you this time because I have two things to inform you. The first thing is about the god-level time talent, after communicating with that innate god, he is willing to guide you for a while, and will also let you enter a time secret realm to understand the law of time. The second thing is about the Immortals, and the plan for the Terrans to evolve towards the Immortals is about to begin. However, it is impossible to do it on a large scale at first, otherwise the impact will be too great and it will attract the attention of other cosmic clans. Therefore, our Terran race is preparing to conduct a pilot in some places, and after the consultation of several of our supremes, your hometown will be one of the pilots. When the time comes, you will be responsible, what do you think?"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded in response.

"Alright, I'll take you to that innate god first. The other party is called the Lord of Cangyu, but he is an innate deity born in the Cangyu Realm, and now he is in charge of the Cangyu Realm, and has opened up countless small worlds near the Cangyu Realm, and is the master of the Cangyu Ten Thousand Realms. "

Kunwu Supreme explained.

Ye Tian listened carefully and nodded again and again.

Swish!

Kunwu Supreme waved his hand, and the void transformed.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian had already left the Supreme Hall of the Human Race with the Kunwu Supreme, and continued to shuttle through one star field after another.

The speed of a supreme is very fast, no less than a nine-star spaceship, and even much faster than an ordinary nine-star spaceship.

After a day, Ye Tian had already moved away from the Terran Star Domain and came to a silent starry sky.

Soon, points of light appeared in the starry sky, and these points of light converged together to form a dense group of light points, like a cluster of light.

After getting closer, Ye Tiancai found that these points of light were all worlds, and the largest point of light in the center was the Cangyu Realm.

Before Kunwu Supreme could approach the Cangyu Realm, a laugh came.

"Hahaha, Kunwu Supreme, you're here!"

Wow!

A humanoid creature with a body as high as 10,000 feet appeared in front of the Kunwu Supreme, staring at the Kunwu Supreme.

He is the Lord of the Feathers!

"Lord of Cangyu, this is His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws of our human race!"

Kungo Supreme introduced to the Lord of Cangyu.

The Lord of Cangyu stared at Ye Tian and commented, "Yes, I am expected to become a Supreme in the future!"

"I've seen the Lord of the Feathers!"

Ye Tian bent down and said respectfully.

"Let's go, little guy, I will guide you for ten years, whether you can gain something or not, it depends on luck!" said the Lord of Blue Feathers with a smile.

"Lord of the Feathers, then this little guy will be handed over to you!"

Kunwu Supreme please.

Ye Tian followed the Lord of Cangyu into the Cangyu Realm, while the Kunwu Supreme left temporarily.

--------

Cangyu Realm.

The Lord of Cangyu took Ye Tian into his palace.

Here, there is not a single guard, only the Lord of the Feather lives in this huge palace.

At this time, Ye Tian's mind did not pay attention to this, but placed it on the body of the Lord of Cangyu.

When he was close to the Lord of the Blue Feather, he checked the talent of the Lord of the Blue Feather, and among them was the god-level time talent.

For the first time, Ye Tian copied the god-level time talent of the Lord of Cangyu.

After copying the god-level time talent, Ye Tian was much more relaxed, after all, this time the task was completed.

Of course, he also wanted to take a good rest with the Lord of Cangyu, the cultivation of time talent and the law of time.

After all, in terms of the attainment of the law of time, the Lord of Cangyu undoubtedly surpassed him far ahead.

In the following time, the Lord of Cangyu was indeed very dedicated to guiding Ye Tian, telling him about the knowledge of the law of time, and guiding him how to comprehend the law of time.

If you can comprehend the essence of the law of time, you can hope to raise the mystical time talent to the god level, or absorb the origin of the time origin artifact, and you can also raise the time talent to the god level.

But how rare the Time Origin Artifact is, it is estimated that even the Terrans do not have a Time Origin Artifact.

Even if the Lord of Cangyu had a Time Origin Artifact, he would not take it out for Ye Tian to absorb its Origin.

Ye Tian did not immediately fuse the god-level time talent, because the Lord of Cangyu often examined his use of time power, if once he fused the god-level time talent, no matter how much he hid it, he would not be able to hide it from the Lord of Cangyu.

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to leave the Cangyu Realm and return to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race to fuse the god-level time talent again.

And just like that, time passed little by little.

In the Lord of Cangyu, Ye Tian learned a lot about time.

Especially when he learned that the talent of time could even reverse time and space in the end and resurrect the dead creatures in the past, Ye Tian was really shocked.

Reversing time and space is an amazing time supernatural power, time talent must reach the god level, and have a supreme level of cultivation, in order to practice the time supernatural power, otherwise forcibly cast the great power of reversing time and space, you will be attacked by the universe, even if you don't die, you will be seriously injured.

Knowing this information, combined with the situation of the Lord of Cangyu, Ye Tian had a bold guess.

The Lord of the Feathers should be able to cast the great power of reversing time and space, and be able to resurrect the dead creatures of the past.

Of course, such a resurrection has a price, and the higher the cultivation of the resurrected person, the higher the cost.

Knowing this, Ye Tian became more enthusiastic about the study of time.

this day.

The Lord of Cangyu brought a supernatural power, "This is a time supernatural power that your human race supreme hall asked me to transfer to you, your time talent has reached the arcane level, you can cultivate the time supernatural power, if you can practice a time supernatural power, it will also be very helpful for you to study the law of time." "

Ye Tian took this time magic power and carefully browsed it.

"Spear of Time!"

This time magic power is very terrifying, and it is even more of a disaster for the emperor level, and it is extremely terrifying even for the god-level powerhouse.

Once the Spear of Time is practiced, as long as it reaches the entry level, if it hits the enemy, it can take away the enemy's lifespan for 2,000 years, and it can also annihilate the enemy's vitality.

Of course, if the Spear of Time is just an introductory stage, it can only be cast three times a day.

However, if you can cultivate the Spear of Time to the Dacheng realm, you can cut the life of the enemy by up to 3,000 years, and you can cast it ten times in a day.

What is this probability?

That means that Ye Tian can cut off the enemy's total lifespan of 30,000 years in one day, while most of the current god-level powerhouses of the human race only have a lifespan of 10,000 years, and when they encounter Ye Tian's Time Spear, they will definitely run out of life and die.

Next, Ye Tian began to seriously cultivate the Spear of Time, and this time the Supreme Hall of the Human Race also sent the material to assist in cultivating the Spear of Time-Time Gravel!

With the grit of time, coupled with the guidance of the Lord of the Feathers, plus Ye Tian's own comprehension and comprehension talent, it didn't take long to successfully practice the magic power of the spear of time.

In the blink of an eye, it had been nine years since Ye Tian came to the Cangyu Realm, and there was only one year left before he needed to leave.

this day.

The Lord of Cangyu took Ye Tian to a secret realm of time—the Hengsha Realm!

Rumble!!!!!

The void rippled, and Ye Tian found himself in a secret world full of deserts.

The power of time here is very unstable, and the power of the laws of time emerges in the void.

"Time here is unstable, the law of time is revealed, and you can understand the law of time here. In a year's time, I'll take you away again!"

After saying that, the Lord of the Blue Feather left.

Not long after the Lord of Cangyu left, Ye Tian couldn't hold back anymore and immediately began to fuse the god-level time talent.

"Fusion!"

Ye Tian's heart moved, and he began to fuse.

Soon, the talent for time began to metamorphose.
